ListItem.Para: At least one left cabin air compressor operates normally.
At least one right cabin air compressor operates normally.

Note.Para: For an air conditioning pack to be operating normally, certain items associated with that system must operate normally. See MEL item 21-51-01 for a list of those items.
For a cabin air compressor to be operating normally, certain items must operate normally. See MEL item 21-52-01 for a list of those items.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the upper recirculation fan (AMM DDG 21-25-01).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
At least one left cabin air compressor operates normally.
At least one right cabin air compressor operates normally.

Note.Para: For an air conditioning pack to be operating normally, certain items associated with that system must operate normally. See MEL item 21-51-01 for a list of those items.
For a cabin air compressor to be operating normally, certain items must operate normally. See MEL item 21-52-01 for a list of those items.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative lower recirculation fan (AMM DDG 21-25-01).

ListItem.Para: For lower left recirculation fan inoperative:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
For lower right recirculation fan inoperative:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
At least one left cabin air compressor operates normally.
At least one right cabin air compressor operates normally.

Note.Para: For an air conditioning pack to be operating normally, certain items associated with that system must operate normally. See MEL item 21-51-01 for a list of those items.
For a cabin air compressor to be operating normally, certain items must operate normally. See MEL item 21-52-01 for a list of those items.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative upper recirculation fan (AMM DDG 21-25-01).

ListItem.Para: For upper aft recirculation fan inoperative:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
For upper fwd recirculation fan inoperative:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:

OperationNote.Para: For upper aft recirculation fan inoperative, forward cargo compartment cooling capacity may be degraded. Temperature sensitive cargo requiring should not be carried in the forward cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details.

ListItem.Para: All cabin air compressors operate normally.

Note.Para: For an air conditioning pack to be operating normally, certain items associated with that system must operate normally. See MEL item 21-51-01 for a list of those items.
For a cabin air compressor to be operating normally, certain items must operate normally. See MEL item 21-52-01 for a list of those items.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative lower recirculation fan (AMM DDG 21-25-01).

ListItem.Para: For lower left recirculation fan inoperative:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
For lower right recirculation fan inoperative:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:

OperationNote.Para: Forward cargo compartment cooling capacity may be degraded. Temperature sensitive cargo requiring should not be carried in the forward cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One or both may be inoperative.
